title: FloristryWarehouse Oasis Naylorbase Wreath Rings 16 Inch x 2 Plastic backed
features: Pack of 2 x 16 inch (41cm) genuine Oasis Naylorbase plastic backed wreath rings
5cm deep Maxlife foam giving up to 50% longer flower life, quick saturation and low drainage
Super strong injection moulded plastic base
description: Pack of two 16 inch (41cm) genuine Oasis Naylorbase plastic backed wreath rings with new Maxlife foam giving up to 50% longer flower life. Internal diameter 29.5cm Super strong injection moulded plastic base. 5cm depth of OASIS foam with quick saturation and low drainage. Water reservoir Anti-slip feet prevent movement and damage. Plastic lip provides support for foliage and decoration ribbon. Can also be used for artificial flowers. For 35 years Oasis Naylorbase has set the standard by which all other foams and bases are measured. Today it remains the brand of choice for designers around the world. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approximate.
